name: Toy Farm Tractor - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
The Toy Farm Tractor from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia makes a great addition to your kid's playtime. This toy features a farm tractor in green and black color to inspire hours of imaginative play. As cute as they are fun to play with, this toy farm tractor also make a great home decor piece.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
